hero.title: The Essence of Thai Cuisine in the Heart of the City
hero.subtitle: Experience refined elegance amid hand-carved Teak wood interiors, where every dish is a piece of traditional culinary art.

signature.title: Signature Menu: Tom Yum Kung
signature.desc: Thailand's iconic soup, a perfect balance of fresh river prawns, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves and fiery chili heat. At Siam Flavors, we honor the traditional recipe to deliver the most authentic flavor.

menuSection.title: Siam Flavors Menu
menuSection.subtitle: A curated selection of the most authentic Thai dishes, made fresh every day.

items.name: Som Tam Papaya Salad
items.desc: Shredded green papaya tossed with chili, garlic, peanuts and tangy-sweet fish sauce, true to Thai flavor.

items.name: Thai Shrimp Spring Rolls
items.desc: Crispy spring rolls filled with fresh shrimp, served with a signature sweet and sour dipping sauce.

items.name: Chicken Satay Skewers
items.desc: Charcoal-grilled chicken marinated in satay spices, served with rich peanut sauce.

items.name: Green Curry Chicken
items.desc: Mildly spicy green curry simmered in coconut milk with eggplant and tender chicken breast.

items.name: Red Curry Beef
items.desc: The signature fiery kick of Thai red chili blended with tender beef and vegetables.

items.name: Yellow Curry Seafood
items.desc: Fragrant turmeric yellow curry cooked with shrimp, fresh squid and potatoes.

items.name: Tamarind Prawns
items.desc: Crispy fried king prawns coated in sweet-and-sour tamarind sauce, topped with fresh chili.

items.name: Grilled Squid with Lemongrass Chili
items.desc: Fresh squid grilled with fragrant lemongrass, chili and kaffir lime leaves.

items.name: Steamed Fish with Lemongrass and Lime
items.desc: Fresh fish steamed with lemongrass, chili and lime in classic Thai style.

items.name: Thai Mango Sticky Rice
items.desc: Fragrant glutinous rice served with ripe mango and rich coconut cream.

items.name: Thai-Style Grilled Banana
items.desc: Caramelized grilled banana blended with fragrant, creamy coconut milk.

items.name: Thai Ginger Tofu Pudding
items.desc: Silky-smooth tofu pudding served in warm, soothing ginger syrup.

team.title: Our Kitchen Team
team.subtitle: The quiet artisans behind every exquisite flavor

members.name: Chef Anan
members.quote: Cooking is how we tell the story of Thai culture to every guest.

members.name: Chef Malee
members.quote: Dessert is the sweetest farewell from the heart of Siam.

members.name: Team Siam
members.quote: Perfect teamwork brings a consistent experience to every plate.

items.quote: The space here is truly breathtaking. It feels like dining in an old Bangkok palace. The food is flawless, incredibly authentic.
items.name: Mr. Hoang Nam

items.quote: The Pad Thai and Tom Yum are the best. The staff are attentive and warm, true Thai hospitality.
items.name: Ms. Lan Phuong

items.quote: Wonderful for family celebrations. Private, cozy and elegant space. I'll definitely be back many more times.
items.name: Mr. Minh Thanh
